release_search.source_comment: paper.tex line 161 contains a commented-out claim that code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MCPEvol-Bench-B31D; the URL is not rendered in the PDF.
release_search.web_search_result: Exact-title, arXiv-ID, and release-token searches found the arXiv paper and third-party summaries, but no verifiable author-owned code or dataset repository.

timing_boundary: No implementation or empirical dataset was available for release audit on 2026-07-18. All benchmark/result claims in the review are manuscript-reported; only the immutable paper and complete arXiv source were inspected.
